mapper.select: SELECT id, store_id, name, original_price, discount_price, discount_rate, stock, expire_at, thumbnail_url, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM items WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, store_id, name, original_price, discount_price, discount_rate, stock, expire_at, thumbnail_url, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM items WHERE id = #{itemId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO items (store_id, name, original_price, discount_price, discount_rate, stock, expire_at, thumbnail_url) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{name}, #{originalPrice}, #{discountPrice}, #{discountRate}, #{stock}, #{expireAt}, #{thumbnailUrl})
mapper.update: UPDATE items SET name = #{name}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, discount_price = #{discountPrice}, discount_rate = #{discountRate}, stock = #{stock}, expire_at = #{expireAt}, thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND store_id = #{storeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
